chat.plan_mode_tooltip: In Plan mode, GLLM Code will gather information to architect a plan
chat.act_mode_tooltip: In Act mode, GLLM Code will complete the task immediately
chat.helper_text: Type @ for context, / for slash commands & workflows, hold shift to drag in files/images

settings.title: Settings
settings.preferred_language_description: The language that GLLM Code should use for communication.

sections.mcp_display_mode_desc: Controls how MCP responses are displayed
sections.remote_locked: This setting is managed by your organization's remote configuration

general_settings.telemetry_desc: Help improve GLLM Code by sending usage data and error reports. No code, prompts, or personal information are ever sent. See our

subagents.label: Subagents
subagents.description: Let GLLM Code run focused subagents in parallel to explore the codebase for you.

native-tool-call.label: Native Tool Call
native-tool-call.description: Use native function calling when available

strict-plan-mode.label: Strict Plan Mode
strict-plan-mode.description: Prevents file edits while in Plan mode

show-feature-tips.label: Feature Tips
show-feature-tips.description: Show rotating tips during the thinking phase to help you discover GLLM Code features.

background-edit.label: Background Edit
background-edit.description: Allow edits without stealing editor focus

checkpoints.label: Checkpoints
checkpoints.description: Save progress at key points for easy rollback

cline-web-tools.label: Web Tools
cline-web-tools.description: Access web browsing and search capabilities

worktrees.label: Worktrees
worktrees.description: Enables git worktree management for running parallel tasks.

yolo.label: Yolo Mode
yolo.description: Execute tasks without user's confirmation. Auto-switches from Plan to Act mode and disables the ask question tool. Use with extreme caution.

double-check-completion.label: Double-Check Completion
double-check-completion.description: Rejects the first completion attempt and asks the model to re-verify its work against the original task requirements before accepting.

lazy-teammate.label: Lazy Teammate Mode
lazy-teammate.description: Sometimes GLLM Code just isn't feeling it today. For entertainment purposes only.

hooks.label: Hooks
hooks.description: Enable lifecycle and tool hooks during task execution.

about.description: An AI assistant that can use your CLI and Editor. GLLM Code can handle complex software development tasks step-by-step with tools that let it create & edit files, explore large projects, use the browser, and execute terminal commands (after you grant permission).
